chain.thought: Explanation: Rolf Stommelen is the only German driver among the finishers, placing 6th; therefore, he is the first German to finish.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists finishers by position. Among the drivers, Rolf Stommelen (row 6) is German and finished 6th. All drivers ahead of him are from other countries (Jackie Stewart – UK, Ronnie Peterson – Sweden, Jacky Ickx – Belgium, Denny Hulme – New Zealand, Emerson Fittipaldi – Brazil). No other German appears ahead of Stommelen in the finishing order, making him the first German to finish.
